Name: PREFIX.penable
Description: Drives the APB second-phase enable to complete APB transfers according to protocol timing.

Name: PREFIX.pwrite
Description: Indicates whether the current APB transaction is a write (1) or a read (0).

Name: PREFIX.paddr
Description: Carries the APB address derived from the decoded AXI command for register access at the APB slave.

Name: PREFIX.pwdata
Description: Carries 32-bit data from AXI to APB during write transactions.

Name: PREFIX.cmd_err
Description: Indicates that an error was detected in command processing, influencing the response generation on AXI side.

Name: PREFIX.finish_wr
Description: Signals completion of an APB write transaction to the control/command path for advancing or retiring the command.

Name: PREFIX.finish_rd
Description: Signals completion of an APB read transaction to the control/command path for advancing or retiring the command.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_cmd.finish_wr
Description: Input signal from the write path indicating that the current write transaction has completed; used to generate cmd_pop when the queued command is a write.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_cmd.finish_rd
Description: Input signal from the read path indicating that the current read transaction has completed; used to generate cmd_pop when the queued command is a read.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_cmd.cmd_err
Description: Output error indicator associated with the command (e.g., unsupported size/length) propagated from AERR through the FIFO.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.psel
Description: Drives the APB select signal to start an APB access and to choose the targeted APB slave when combined with address decoding elsewhere. Asserted on wstart/rstart and deasserted on APB acknowledge (pack).

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.penable
Description: Sequences the second phase of an APB transfer; asserted after psel and cleared upon APB acknowledge (pack).

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.pwrite
Description: Indicates transaction direction (1=write, 0=read). Asserted only on write starts and cleared on acknowledge.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.finish_wr
Description: Input flag from write path signaling completion of a write; used to clear busy and allow new commands.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.finish_rd
Description: Input flag from read path signaling completion of a read; used to clear busy and allow new commands.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.pready
Description: APB slave ready input; contributes to pack (ack) creation to complete the APB access.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_ctrl.cmd_ready
Description: Internal ready signal computed as (~busy) & (~cmd_empty); qualifies whether a new command may start.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_mux.cmd_addr
Description: Carries the decoded AXI/APB command address into the mux to determine which APB slave is selected.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_mux.psel
Description: Enables an APB access and gates updates of prdata and pslverr; combined with slave_num to generate pselSX.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_mux.prdata
Description: Latched read data forwarded to the controller when a transfer completes (psel & pready).

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_mux.pslverr
Description: Latched error indication forwarded to the controller upon transfer completion.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_rd.cmd_err
Description: Feeds into read response generation; when a read data beat is accepted, cmd_err is used to select the AXI RRESP value (error vs OK).

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_rd.finish_rd
Description: Asserted when a read beat completes handshaking (RVALID & RREADY) and is the last beat (RLAST), signaling the end of a read operation to surrounding control logic.

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_wr.cmd_err
Description: Indicates whether the current command encountered an error; the write path uses it to form the AXI BRESP (SLVERR if asserted).

Name: PREFIX.PREFIX_wr.finish_wr
Description: Asserts when the AXI B-channel handshake completes (BVALID & BREADY), signaling that a write transaction has finished.
